title: OrderCancellationRequested.v1
description: A customer or operator asked Order Service to cancel a nonterminal order that has not yet been dispatched. Fulfillment, Payment, and Inventory Services each react by compensating whatever they individually still hold for this order (a no-op if they hold nothing), then report back on their own topics so Order Service can finalize the order once every required compensation is confirmed.

reasonCode.description: RECONCILIATION_RETRY is a safe, idempotent re-publish of an already-tracked cancellation that reconciliation found stuck — every consumer of this event checks its own local state before acting, so a repeat is always a no-op wherever compensation already happened.
